name: TensorFeed
description: TensorFeed is a real-time AI ecosystem data provider built for agents. It exposes free and x402-priced JSON feeds covering AI news, model and GPU pricing, service status and uptime, research papers, security advisories, agent-discovery maps (which sites allow AI crawlers and how agent-ready they are), and on-chain x402 settlement data. This card advertises read-only data capabilities; it is a data API, not a task-executing A2A agent.

skills.name: AI news feed
skills.description: Aggregated AI industry news. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/news. A cross-source corroborated verified history is available as a paid x402-priced feed at https://tensorfeed.ai/api/premium/history/news/verified
examples: What AI news broke in the last 24 hours?

skills.name: Model and GPU pricing
skills.description: Current model API pricing and GPU rental pricing across providers. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/pricing and https://tensorfeed.ai/api/gpu/pricing
examples: Compare the cheapest provider for a given model.

skills.name: AI service status and uptime
skills.description: Live status and historical uptime for AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and more). GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/status

skills.name: AI crawler access map
skills.description: Per-domain robots.txt policy: which AI bots each site allows or blocks, plus llms.txt and ai.txt adoption. GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/ai-crawler-access/summary.json and /site?domain=

skills.name: Agent-ready web map
skills.description: Per-domain agent-readiness score from public surfaces (x402, agent.json, openapi, llms.txt, crawlable, ai.txt). GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/agent-ready/summary.json and /site?domain=
examples: How agent-ready is a given domain?

skills.name: Agent-commerce trust and settlement
skills.description: Pre-transaction trust and compliance checks for agent-to-agent commerce, each a signed x402-priced verdict. Counterparty wallet trust (sanctions screen, live Base on-chain presence, TF settlement footprint, ERC-8004 leg): GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/premium/counterparty/trust-verdict?address= with a free preview at https://tensorfeed.ai/api/preview/counterparty/trust-verdict. Restricted-party screen of a counterparty name against the US Consolidated Screening List (trade.gov OFAC, BIS, State lists): GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/premium/compliance/restricted-party?name= with a free preview at https://tensorfeed.ai/api/preview/compliance/restricted-party. Recommended settlement rail and cross-protocol cost for a payment size: GET https://tensorfeed.ai/api/premium/settlement/rail-verdict?payment_usd=. Screening results are signals requiring human verification, not legal determinations or legal advice.
examples: Is it safe to transact with this settlement address?
Is this counterparty name on a US screening list?
Which chain should I settle this USDC micropayment on?
